notes: v1.3.1 — Fixes from real testing. In-app updates now apply from a helper that runs after the launcher closes, so antivirus can't block the file swap mid-update (the 'download it from GitHub' fallback should be rare now). Importing from another launcher no longer hangs — it skips junction loops, tolerates locked files, shows real progress, and hides the Import button while it works. And Play with a Friend now lets you type a port (for dedicated servers, or when Open-to-LAN isn't auto-detected) with clear status at each step.
